escalation.rationale: Ceasefire violations with drone strikes on Gulf states and cargo ship while peace negotiations continue.

ticker_items: Iran ceasefire tested by drone attacks on Qatar cargo ship, Kuwait airspace
Putin claims Ukraine war 'coming to completion' after scaled-back Victory Day
Royal Navy deploying HMS Dragon to protect Strait of Hormuz reopening
US intelligence flights surge off Cuba amid regional tensions
Iran reviewing 14-point US peace proposal including uranium enrichment ban

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrike kills at least 7 including a child, wounds 15 in southern village.
Iranian forces strike oil tanker causing fire in Strait of Hormuz area.
Drone strike set fire on cargo ship off Qatar coast
Hostile drones entered Kuwaiti airspace before being repelled
Drones entered UAE airspace and were repelled by forces
Israeli airstrikes killed at least 24 people in Lebanon

claimed_totals.figure: 3,468 dead in Iran, 2,702 dead in Lebanon, 28 killed in Gulf states

russia.text: I think that the matter is coming to an end
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

russia.text: I think the Ukraine war is coming to an end
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

middle_east.text: Iran has sent its response to the latest U.S. ceasefire proposal to Pakistani mediators
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government sources

middle_east.text: Iran will scale up combat operations to new battlefields should the United States and Israel again start military aggression against Iran
middle_east.speaker: Mohammad Akraminia
middle_east.title: Iranian Army Spokesperson

middle_east.text: American military operations against Iran may not be over, suggesting the United States could still target additional sites if necessary
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Pakistan continues mediating between US and Iran on peace proposal. Iranian response to 14-point US plan transmitted through Pakistani channels. Officials signal deal expected 'sooner rather than later'.

Xi Jinping scheduled to meet Trump in Beijing next week with major global implications. Putin consulted China along with India and US before announcing Ukraine ceasefire. Beijing maintaining diplomatic engagement on multiple fronts.

India consulted by Putin alongside China and US before Ukraine ceasefire announcement. New Delhi continuing its balancing act between major powers while maintaining strategic autonomy in both conflicts.

Royal Navy deploying HMS Dragon destroyer from Mediterranean to Middle East to protect tankers when Strait of Hormuz reopens. The Type-45 destroyer was previously safeguarding British military bases from Iranian drone strikes.

financial.notes: Global oil prices dropped following reports of US-Iran peace proposal progress.

update_log.text: Iran ceasefire tested as drone strikes hit Qatar cargo ship, Kuwait and UAE airspace
Israeli airstrikes kill at least 24 people in Lebanon as Tehran reviews US peace proposal
Putin claims Ukraine war coming to completion during scaled-back Victory Day parade
Royal Navy deploying HMS Dragon to Middle East for Strait of Hormuz protection duties
US intelligence gathering flights surge off Cuba amid regional tensions
Putin declares Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end' after scaled-back Victory Day parade
Iran rejects latest US 14-point peace proposal through Pakistani mediators
Israeli strikes kill 36 in Lebanon despite ceasefire, including 7 in Saksakiyeh village
Iran threatens US Middle East sites over tanker attacks in Strait of Hormuz
